purpose: Route greenfield product requests through startup pressure testing, strategy, requirements, and system-design stages without skipping prerequisites.
selection_order: If the real question is whether the thesis survives, route to startup-pressure-test first.
If the user needs MVP framing or a first strategy / blueprint, route to product-blueprint.
If a validated blueprint exists and the work is turning it into requirements, route to requirements-writer.
If a validated PRD exists and the work is system design, route to system-architect.
If the request would skip a prerequisite stage, route to the prerequisite child first.

children.name: startup-pressure-test
children.summary: Pressure-tests a startup thesis, launch plan, GTM path, and early unit economics before blueprinting goes too far.
route_when: The real question is startup viability, GTM realism, CAC/churn/runway, or whether the business survives market contact.
The idea is still unproven enough that a commercial teardown should happen before strategy or PRD work.
avoid_when: The direction is already validated and the work is strategy / blueprint creation.
The user already asked for requirements or system design downstream of a validated blueprint.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically.

children.name: product-blueprint
children.summary: Turns raw ideas into product strategy, MVP framing, and the blueprint that becomes `.agents-stack/reference/design.md`.
route_when: The user is starting from a raw idea and needs the first strategic blueprint or MVP shape.
The work is product strategy rather than commercial pressure testing, requirements, or system design.
avoid_when: The main need is startup viability teardown.
A validated blueprint already exists and the remaining work is requirements or system design.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically.

children.name: requirements-writer
children.summary: Turns a validated blueprint into actionable requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria in `.agents-stack/reference/product/requirements.md`.
route_when: A validated blueprint exists and the work is turning it into a PRD / requirements document.
The user needs user stories, acceptance criteria, or edge cases for an approved direction.
avoid_when: A validated PRD already exists and the work is system design.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically.

children.name: system-architect
children.summary: Turns a validated PRD into concrete schemas, APIs, state flows, and infrastructure decisions for v1.
route_when: A validated PRD exists and the work is system design.
The user needs schema, API contract, state-flow, or infrastructure decisions.
avoid_when: The product direction is still being shaped at strategy or PRD level.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing if the runtime cannot discover bundled children automatically.
